description: Advanced precision agriculture pipelines combining Edge AI, multispectral imaging, and autonomous flight swarms. Build end-to-end data systems that process raw sensor feeds into actionable agronomic insights in real-time.
learning_objectives: Understand agricultural and environmental monitoring requirements (crop types, phenology, pest cycles, regulatory reporting)
Build and train AI models for plant health assessment (NDVI, disease detection, pest identification), yield estimation, and wildlife counting
Create geospatial and multispectral data pipelines for field‑scale analysis and long‑term trend monitoring
Deploy optimized models on edge hardware for real‑time field scouting and targeted treatment
Implement automated reporting and integration with farm management software (e.g., Climate FieldView, John Deere Operations Center)
Design efficient flight paths for large‑area coverage with battery constraints
Comply with agricultural aviation regulations and environmental reporting standards

modules.title: Multispectral & Hyperspectral Processing Pipeline
modules.description: Develop low-latency pipelines for radiometric calibration, band alignment, and vegetative index calculation on Edge TPUs and Jetson devices.

modules.title: Autonomous Swarm Crop Scouting
modules.description: Deploy distributed ROS 2 architectures to control drone swarms over massive agricultural networks.

modules.title: Edge AI Plant Disease & Weed Detection
modules.description: Train and deploy quantized Object Detection models capable of identifying tiny anomalies at high flight speeds.
topics: Dataset Generation with synthetic environments (Isaac Sim)
YOLOv8 & RT-DETR model fine-tuning for agriculture
DeepSORT for precise weed counting & localization
Real-time targeted spraying actuator integration (ROS Action Servers)

modules.title: Agronomic Data Lake & Spatial Analytics
modules.description: Design a scalable backend infrastructure handling terabytes of geospatial imagery and telemetry data.
topics: PostGIS for spatial querying and intersection
Data pipeline orchestration with Apache Airflow

capstone_project.name: Autonomous Crop Health Scouting and Targeted Spraying
capstone_project.description: Build and test a drone system that autonomously scouts a corn or soybean field, computes NDVI maps, identifies stressed zones (NDVI < 0.4), and performs targeted spraying on those zones. The system must log all flights and spray events, and generate a prescription map for future reference. Achieve >90% accuracy in identifying stressed zones and reduce chemical use by at least 30% compared to blanket spraying.
deliverables: ROS 2 nodes for flight planning, NDVI computation, and spray control
PostGIS/TimescaleDB database with field boundaries and inspection history
HIL simulation report showing spray efficiency

resources.name: UAV4Ag Dataset for Crop Disease Detection

glossary.definition: The process of converting raw digital pixel numbers into physical units like reflectance, accounting for ambient light sensors.
Normalized Difference Vegetation Index. A mathematical formula derived from Near-Infrared and Red light bands used to quantify vegetation greenness.
A regular GeoTIFF file, hosted on a HTTP file server, with an internal organization that enables efficient network streaming and partial reading.
A continuous back-and-forth path planning pattern commonly used for complete area coverage in farming and surveying.
SpatioTemporal Asset Catalog. A standard API specification that provides a common language to describe geospatial information for indexing.
